summary: Iteration 7: PUT /api/users/{user_id} Edit User endpoint testing completed - 12/12 tests passed (100%). All 10 requested features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/users/{user_id} endpoint correctly validates role against: student, supervisor, implant_incharge, administrator, nurse
Only administrator and implant_incharge can update users (403 for student)
Returns 404 for nonexistent user with valid ObjectId format
Returns 400 for empty payload with 'No fields to update' message
Returns 400 for invalid role with 'Invalid role' message
Whitespace-only name/password fields are correctly stripped and treated as empty
Password hashing using bcrypt is working correctly (old password fails after reset, new password works)
Role changes persist correctly to database (verified via GET after update)
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix (e.g., TEST_UpdateTarget_*) and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: PUT /api/users/{user_id} endpoint fully tested. UserUpdate model fields (name, role, password) all optional. Role validation, authorization (admin/implant_incharge only), password reset with login verification, and data persistence all working correctly.

tested_features.1_role_change_only: PASS - PUT with role change updates user role and persists
tested_features.2_password_reset_only: PASS - PUT with password field resets password
tested_features.3_name_change_only: PASS - PUT with name change updates and persists
tested_features.4_multiple_fields: PASS - PUT with name + role + password updates all fields
tested_features.5_empty_payload_400: PASS - Empty {} payload returns 400 'No fields to update'
tested_features.7_nonexistent_user_404: PASS - Nonexistent user_id returns 404 'User not found'
tested_features.8_student_403: PASS - Student role returns 403 (only admin/implant_incharge allowed)
tested_features.9_password_login_verify: PASS - After password reset, old password fails (401), new password works (200)
tested_features.10_role_persistence: PASS - Role changes to all 5 valid roles verified via GET
